common.referenceOnly: Reference only. Not for diagnosis, treatment planning, measurements, or implant workflows.

importPage.title: Voxel Viewer
importPage.description: Inspect CBCT (Cone Beam Computed Tomography) scans directly in the browser from local study folders. The viewer parses supported exports locally and opens them as linked 2D slice views with a 3D volume overview.

galileos.title: GALILEOS
galileos.description: Legacy GALILEOS study volumes stored as compressed slice files.
galileos.instruction: Select the study folder that contains <0>*_vol_0</0> and <1>*_vol_0_###</1>.

oneVolume.title: OneVolume CT
oneVolume.description: Native OneVolume volume stored in CT_0.vol.
oneVolume.instruction: Select the <0>CT_*</0> folder, or the export root if you want the app to auto-detect the nested CT study folder.

dicom.title: DICOM CT
dicom.description: Standard DICOM slice stacks exported from compatible CT software.
dicom.instruction: Select the folder that contains the <0>.dcm</0> slices, usually <1>DICOM/</1>.

importPage.referenceNote: <0>Series_01/</0> is reference material only and is not imported.

folderPicker.title: Open a scan folder
folderPicker.description: Choose a local export folder to load the scan into the viewer.
folderPicker.detail: The app builds the volume in-browser and opens linked axial, sagittal, coronal, and 3D views.
folderPicker.unsupportedHint: Folder selection needs a browser with directory upload support. Safari on iPhone requires iOS 18.4+.

progress.selectFolder: Select a supported CT folder to begin

viewerSidebar.windowHint: Contrast span. Smaller window = more contrast.
viewerSidebar.levelHint: Brightness bias. Higher level favors denser tissue.
viewerSidebar.dragHint: Drag inside any 2D pane to scrub linked slices.
viewerSidebar.zoomHint: Wheel or pinch to zoom; when zoomed, scrubbing keeps the crosshair centered when possible.
viewerSidebar.orientationHint: Coronal and sagittal views are flipped so superior anatomy stays at the top.
viewerSidebar.volumeDownsampled: Downsampled from full volume to fit GPU texture limits.
viewerSidebar.planeHint: Colored planes in 3D match the current coronal, sagittal, and axial slices.

errors.failedToLoadSelectedScanFolder: Failed to load the selected scan folder.
errors.unsupportedFolderLayout: Unsupported folder layout. Select a GALILEOS study, a OneVolume export root, or a DICOM slice folder.
